name: Desktop Computer
description: The good old Ryzen 7 7700 desktop bought by software for software. This desktop tower is the heavy lifter of the lab, likely running microservices or other servers at 3:00 AM while the rest of the school is asleep. It’s a Medium difficulty find because it’s tucked away in the 'knee hole' of the desk, effectively camouflaged as a piece of furniture. It’s sometimes acts as a very expensive footrest for a student who is desperately trying to figure out why the robot's center of gravity is three inches too high.
